During this duration of 4 years, they would gain many skills which will help them to gain employment.

title: Coast Guard
description: The Indian Coast Guard (ICG) is a maritime armed force operating under the Ministry of Defence. The ICG is responsible for protecting the maritime and other national interests of India in the maritime zones. They provide protection to offshore and other structures. They also provide protection to fishermen and assist in anti smuggling operations.

One of her main roles during the Kargil War was to evacuate the wounded from Kargll, transport supplies, and assist in surveillance.She would go on to be part of operations to evacuate over 900 troops, both injured and deceased, from Kargil. In 2004, after serving as a pilot for eight years, her career as a helicopter pilot ended; permanent commissions for women were not available during her time.
source: NCERT/UNICEF Career Guide for School Students, Volume 2, April 2025
